stories.story: As an operator, I want to list all failed workflows from the last hour so that I can triage production issues.
As an operator, I want to find the workflow processing a specific customer order by customer_id so that I can debug a support ticket.
As a workflow author, I want to set custom search attributes (customer_id, order_number) from my workflow code so that operators can find my workflows by business context.
As a dashboard user, I want to see a filterable list of workflows with their status and custom attributes so that I can monitor the system.
As an engine developer, I want a pluggable VisibilityStore trait so that embedded mode uses libSQL and server mode can use a dedicated search backend.
As an operator, I want to count workflows by type and status so that I can build alerting dashboards.
